Body.Content:
We are announcing the ability to improve usability and streamline the expense submission experience in Dynamics 365 Project Operations. This feature will reach general availability on March 25, 2026.

How does this affect me?
These mobile app enhancements address high-impact usability gaps and compliance issues that customers report. The added enhancements improve usability and streamline the overall user experience. This release includes the following improvement:
  • Add financial dimensions to the Expense mobile app: Allows you to add financial dimensions directly within the Expense Management mobile app.
What action do I need to take?
This message is for awareness, and no action is required.

message.Title: Dynamics 365 Project Operations - Experience phase 4 enhancements for Expense mobile app
